title: senecio macedonicus subsp. barckhausiifolius
intro: Senecio macedonicus subsp. barckhausiifolius is a subspecies of the Senecio macedonicus plant, a perennial herb belonging to the asteraceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio macedonicus subsp. barckhausiifolius include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. This plant can be prepared as an infusion or decoction for use in herbal remedies, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
